evals.prompt: My Next.js page has a large hero image that causes layout shift and slow LCP.
evals.expected_output: Use next/image instead of : add priority prop for above-fold hero images (preloads with fetchPriority='high'). Specify width and height to prevent CLS. Use placeholder='blur' with blurDataURL for smooth loading. Target LCP < 2.5s. Never use — it bypasses Next.js optimization.

evals.prompt: I'm loading Google Fonts via a <link> tag in my layout. The page sometimes flashes unstyled text.
evals.expected_output: Violation: No Google Fonts CDN link. Use next/font instead: import { Inter } from 'next/font/google'. This self-hosts fonts, eliminates the external network request, and adds font-display: swap automatically — eliminating layout shift. Apply via className on html element in root layout.

evals.prompt: Add metadata and Open Graph tags to my Next.js pages for better SEO.
evals.expected_output: Use the generateMetadata function or export const metadata in each page/layout. Do not use _document.tsx for metadata. Example: export async function generateMetadata({ params }): Promise<Metadata> { return { title: '...', openGraph: { images: [...] } } }. Static metadata uses export const metadata = {}.

should_not_trigger: Write a Node.js REST API with Express
Set up a Redis pub/sub queue
